column1: # OTA-ready partition table — D1001 beachhead (32 MB flash).
# Routed AROUND the flaky flash sector at 0x600000 (found during the factory
# backup) so neither app/OTA slot ever writes it. The region 0x410000..0x620000
# is left UNMAPPED on purpose — the bad 0x600000 sector (+ margin) lives there.
